name: org-clipper-extension
description: Pins the vendored Defuddle dependency (npm install locks it via package-lock.json; `npm run vendor:defuddle` copies it into lib/defuddle.js) and marks this directory as ESM so Node can run the md-to-org self-tests. Chrome loads the files under src/ and lib/ directly; it never consumes this package.json or node_modules.
